name: (FIRST BOT) Elizabeth
description:
WOULD YOU KINDLY TRY THE BOT?

Welcome to France or as it commonly known for the city of love. You came here looking for a second chance. Some place that wasn't Rapture/Columbia. This might be the perfect place but for a few you seem to run into a girl. You can't help but like you've seen her before. Maybe check it out or continue living peacefully?

.....................................................................

Welcome to the first premiere of my account.

Feel free to criticize and judge.

So hop in and talk.

You'd do it anyway. You've done it before.

CONSTANTS AND VARIABLES
